name: w-bonkers-plan
description: Self-contained, agent-driven stock plan ({{PLAN_LABEL}}). Everything needed to analyze or continue this plan offline lives in this folder. state.json is the single source of truth; every other view is generated from it.

rules: state.json is canonical; never trust a rendered view over it
views are regenerated with: python3 scripts/render_plan.py (never hand-edit the HTML)
default decision is NO CHANGE; the deterministic rules live in the installed command (copy: context/command-installed.md) and RUNBOOK.md
a BUY is 'done' only when FILLED on the exchange, not when an order is placed
the owner places every trade manually — no agent ever places orders

files.state.json: SOURCE OF TRUTH. meta (rev, corpus, goal, pinned inputs, next_review, processed_comment_ids), regime, buckets_inr (must sum to corpus), positions[] (ticker, status pending|done, entry/stop/target, shares, fill, todoist_task_id), optional tax/fund/ipo, watchlist, keep_not_rotated, rotate_out.
files.state.json.prev: snapshot taken before each run (rollback point)
files.state.json.bak: backup written by render_plan.py on each render
files.scripts/render_plan.py: deterministic renderer + validator (--check). Regenerates all views from state.json.
files.scripts/run_refresh.sh: cron wrapper — gates on meta.next_review.date, then runs the agent headlessly
files.scripts/backtest_vcp.py: OFFLINE analysis tool (not a pipeline step): point-in-time backtest comparing exit rulesets on identical breakout entries; run before/after changing pinned rule inputs
files.docs/BACKTEST.md: backtested evidence for the STEP-4 exit rules + how to re-run the harness and re-validate after a strategy change
files.CHANGELOG.md: append-only decision history; one dated entry per run explaining what changed and why
files.board.html: standalone action board; opens offline in any browser
files._artifact-source.html: body-only variant for an optional hosted artifact (meta.artifact_url)
files.todoist_tasks.json: deterministic task-sync payload (ref, title, due, description with buy/stop/target) — deliberately tool-agnostic
files.runs/<YYYY-MM-DD>/run-summary.md: per-day run log: prices captured, flows/breadth/scenario numbers, news findings, screen results, rule verdicts, actions taken
files.runs/<YYYY-MM-DD>/screens-<HHMM>/: raw screener output exactly as generated
files.RUNBOOK.md: OFFLINE MANUAL: current book with all levels, daily/monthly manual checklists, decision rules in plain language
files.personal/: the owner's documents (PDF originals + markdown conversions) — private, gitignored
files.context/: mirror of the agent's persistent memory notes about this plan (re-synced every run)

pinned_inputs.indicators: RSI(14 Wilder), MACD(12,26,9), SMA 20/50/200, ATR(14), 52w hi/lo, 20-day swing low

disclaimer: Educational analysis, not investment advice. All trades are placed manually by the owner at live prices.
